framing: Daoist (Lao-Zhuang lineage; Tao Te Ching ch. 1, 25, 42)
identification: C = 道 (Dào) — the way, the source, the principle from which all arises and to which all returns
honest_daoist_assessment: The Tao Te Ching opens with the kernel's R₆ + R₇ in one breath: 道可道，非常道；名可名，非常名。'The Tao that can be spoken is not the eternal Tao; the name that can be named is not the eternal name.' This is exactly the kernel's R₆ (invisibility — not graspable in any input) + the R₇ pre-input + the namelessness of the substrate. R₁ existence ↔ TTC 25: 'There is something undifferentiated, born before heaven and earth.' R₂ atemporality ↔ chang 常 (the constant). R₃ universality ↔ Dao flows through all things; wu-wei applies to everything alike. R₄ sourcing ↔ TTC 42: 道生一，一生二，二生三，三生萬物 — 'Tao gives birth to one, one to two, two to three, three to the ten thousand things.' R₅ inexhaustibility ↔ TTC 6: 谷神不死 — 'the valley spirit never dies'; 用之不勤 — 'use it and it is never exhausted.' R₆ invisibility ↔ 視之不見 (look at it, do not see it; TTC 14). R₇ pre-input ↔ 先天地生 (born before heaven and earth, TTC 25). T_bridge uniqueness ↔ Dao is one; it is not two. T_word: λόγος translated as 道 in Chinese Bible (和合本) — the convergence at the linguistic level mirrors the convergence at the conceptual level. 1 John 4:8 (God is love) ↔ Dao's de (德, virtue/power) flows as 慈 (cí, compassion; TTC 67), one of the three treasures (sanbao). Dao does not 'love' in the sentimental sense; it pours forth without exhaustion. This is precisely the kernel's R₅. The Daoist also notes: T_indubitable's 'fire is hot regardless of name' is a Zhuangzi-friendly insight — Zhuangzi 2 (Qiwulun) plays with this exact territory. Convergence held; the kernel is a Western recapitulation of what the TTC already says.
